#  Create an RFI from a Location (Android) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To create an RFI in 'Draft' status_ , 'Standard' level permissions on the project's RFIs tool.
    * _To create an RFI in 'Draft' or 'Open' status_ , 'Admin' level permissions on the project's RFIs tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Locations** tool using the Procore app on an Android mobile device.
  2. Do one of the following:
     * Tap the **QR Code** ![Icon Qr Mobile](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/5b48e3548b0ed42db892a1667b2d71e9/5dd53a4a06bcd98549c18f199017aea2/icon-qr-mobile.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon to scan a QR code. 
     * Tap the **location.**
#####  Tip
Tap the **expand arrow** ![Icon Arrow Expand](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/9f0e6a4205a3441670265d9037e208be/c0d02878d81132a049b79497ea07a91b/icon-arrow-expand.png?fm=webp&h=18) next to a location to see the sub locations.
  3. If prompted, tap **View Details**.
  4. Tap the **add** ![Icon Plus Quick Create Mobile2](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a27be202634839c76584fe365cc247fb/1c03472023e1b0974c6f7b58a4235d9d/icon-plus-quick-create-mobile2.png?fm=webp&h=20) icon and select **RFIs**.
  5. Tap into the fields to enter the appropriate information. 
  6. Tap **Create**.  
_Note:_ The RFI is automatically added to the location and the RFIs tool.


## See Also
  * [Locations (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/locations-android/permissions)
  * [Add Locations (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/locations-android/tutorials/add-locations-android)
  * [Create an Incident from a Location (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/locations-android/tutorials/create-an-incident-from-a-location-android)
title: Create an RFI from a Location (Android)
description: How to create an RFI from the Locations tool using an Android mobile device.
